instructions: Copy this template before entering confirmed source_url evidence.
Set manual_confirmed to true only after the exact product detail page is checked.
Put the verified product detail URL in manual_value.
Use evidence_url for the same official/detail page or a stronger supporting URL.
candidate_source_url is only a review hint and must not be imported without manual_confirmed=true.
After source_url is confirmed, use catalog_image_attachment_confirmed_template_public.json for image_url.

candidate_options.title: 2026 AKANE LIZE : OVT. 금속 뱃지 [2차 판매]

store_search_hints.manual_note: Hints are not evidence. Confirm the exact product/detail page before importing.

manual_confirmation_requirements: Open candidate_source_url or manually found source URL.
Confirm it is a product/detail page, not a storefront, search page, or collection page.
Confirm title, character, product type, variant, and release context match the catalog row.
Only then copy the exact product URL into manual_value and set manual_confirmed=true.
